name: Chocolate Lace Cornucopias
recipeIngredient: Whipped cream or COOL WHIP whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large microwavable bowl, microwave sugar, corn syrup, and margarine on HIGH for 2 minutes or until boiling.
3. Stir in melted chocolate until completely combined.
4. Gradually stir in flour and chopped nuts until well blended.
5. Drop tablespoonfuls about 1-2 inches apart onto foil-lined cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. Remove foil and let cookies cool on wire racks covered with paper towels for 3-4 minutes or until easily peeled off the foil.
8. Place several cookies, lace side down, onto a foil-lined baking sheet. Preheat oven to 350°F for 2-3 minutes or until lightly softened.
9. Remove from foil, one at a time, and roll with the lace side out to form cones.
10. Cool completely before serving. Fill each cone with whipped cream.
Makes about 30 cornucopias.
Prep time: 20 minutes. Baking time: 12-13 minutes.
